title.en: This is undoubtedly breaking their cognition!

content.en:
"A killing move above the space-time level Extreme Dao Ultimate Arcane?"

Many Ultimate Ancient Demons are stunned, isn't the space-time level Extreme Dao Ultimate Arcane the strongest move, and there are even more powerful killing moves on it?

This is undoubtedly breaking their cognition!

"Ten Thousand Law Extreme Venerable, can you break the space-time line now?"

Many Ultimate Ancient Demons asked expectantly.

"Yes!" Ye Tian nodded, not concealing, "I just tore the space-time line and sensed other space-time lines, but I haven't really been there yet, I don't know if I can successfully reach that space-time line, and I don't know much about that space-time line!"

It can break the time and space line!

Ye Tian's words made these Ultimate Ancient Demons completely excited, which meant that their hope of survival skyrocketed.

Now, they have to discuss Ye Tian before they can let Ye Tian take ~ them away!

"You guys get out of here, I need to study--a bit!"

Ye Tian said.

These Ultimate Ancient Demons didn't dare to talk nonsense, and immediately retreated.

After these Ultimate Ancient Demons left, Ye Tian pondered for a while, thinking about what to do next.

After thinking about it for a while, he decided to send a replica body over to see if he could successfully reach another time and space line.

Immediately.

A replica of his body appeared here, and together they performed the final killing move.

Click!

The spaceline is broken down, connecting another spaceline.

And at this moment, one of Ye Tian's duplicate bodies rushed along the space-time line crack.

He blessed himself with the Extreme Path Space-Time Ball, the space-time level Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane, protected himself, and shuttled through it with the Extreme Path Space-Time Escape Light.

Airplanes!

The space-time rift was restored, and Ye Tian's duplicate body also disappeared.

......

Inside an unknown valley.

Ye Tian's copy body fell from a void, and his copy body was already very broken and became extremely illusory.

Not only that, but only a trace of his will was shattered, and he was only one step away from falling.

"My replica body is going to crumble!"

Ye Tian was anxious.

His replica body was about to crumble, and the ultimate will of the Extreme Dao was about to dissipate, and he couldn't even condense other replica bodies.

If he didn't change the situation, he would have failed to cross the timeline this timeline.

With his last Extreme Ultimate Will, he sensed that there was a young man who had just fallen nearby.

He immediately shuttled over, burned the energy of the replicated body, merged into the boy's body, repaired his injuries, and then gathered the remnants of the opponent's soul with his own will, occupying the boy's body.

This is a similar kind of grab-and-go!

The seconds passed.

Ye Tian opened his eyes as a young man and looked at the world again.

"It worked, but it didn't work!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Crossing the space-time line was even more thrilling than he imagined, crossing the time-space line directly hit him hard, and after crossing this space-time line, he was also rejected by this space-time line, and the ultimate will of the extreme path and the physical body were directly crushed, if it wasn't for the seizure of this young man's body, his replica body would have really fallen.

Of course, he could continue to teleport and copy his body, but the result was the same, and it couldn't change anything.

"It seems that only by breaking through to the ultimate extreme extremity of the space-time level can we resist the rejection of the space-time line!"

"With my strength is so bleak, if I send my relatives or other human races over, they won't be able to live, it seems that if I want to cross the time and space line to avoid the final catastrophe, it is not as simple as I imagined!"

However, he finally has a clone in this plane.

If this doppelganger grows up, and then gains some knowledge from this timeline to improve his own strength, he will hopefully make his strength go further, which will help him cross the timeline more easily.

The only trouble now is that the connection between his doppelganger and the main body is very weak, and even if some information is transmitted, it will take a long time.

"Improve the strength of this body first, and then slowly understand this timeline!"

He didn't know the situation of this planeline, but judging from the rules when he came in, this timeline should still be relatively young, and it should be far away from the final catastrophe, and its strength should be second only to the ancient demon era.

Of course, the specific situation still depends on the follow-up understanding, and it is only a preliminary judgment at present.

In the blink of an eye, some days passed.

Ye Tian strengthened this body many times, and his strength increased a lot, so he left here.

......

Zilan Mountain.

Ye Tian came here, this is the concentration of cultivators in this area, this mountain is very large, there are a large number of caves and dojos inside, and there are countless buildings under the mountain, gathering billions of people.

It's like a realm of practitioners.

And this body was originally supposed to be one of the cultivators here, but it was in danger and fell and was occupied by him.

He came back and took a look at the situation.

He mainly understands the level of cultivation here first, and then the other situations.

After his understanding, he learned that the cultivation realm here was divided into thirty-six heavens, and each heaven was divided into nine levels.

And the strongest cultivator in Zilan Mountain is a cultivator of the Thirteenth Heaven Eighth Order, and in a place like Zilan Mountain, there are countless worlds on this side.

Ye Tian's body is currently in the realm of the Third Heaven, and it was actually only the First Order of the Second Heaven before, but after being strengthened by him, it has reached the Seventh Order of the Third Heaven, and his strength has undoubtedly skyrocketed many times.

But in this world, this strength is still at the bottom.

Ye Tian was not in a hurry to improve his strength, he first bought some items, used his refining memory, refined some weapons to sell, made some money, and then bought the exercises of this space-time line.

There was no way, when his replica body came over, it was crushed, and the items on his body were gone, otherwise he wouldn't have thought about making money to buy exercises.

As long as he uses these exercises to understand the cultivation of this space-time immortal, it is just for reference.

When a bunch of exercises were placed in front of him, he studied them for a while, and only then did he understand that the cultivation system of this time-space line was different from the place where he was.

This space-time line is mainly based on opening up the heavy palace in the body, and the thirty-six heavens are the thirty-six palaces.

Every time a heavy palace is condensed, the heavy palace will automatically temper the physical body and refine the mana, and the strength will be very strong, and many moves also revolve around the heavy palace in the body, and there are many types of heavy palaces, and the difference is very big.
